model_week: Typical week — averaged from full year 2023
data_sources: CTA Rail Hourly Ridership - Chicago Data Portal (full year 2023)
CTA Bus Route Ridership - Chicago Data Portal (full year 2023)
CTA GTFS (bus stop and rail station locations)
methodology: Block-level overnight populations from US Census 2020. Hourly net inflows/outflows from CTA rail (400m buffer) and CTA bus (150m buffer), each scaled by their respective mode shares (rail 25%, bus 35%). Full year 2023 data with 3-sigma outlier removal and federal holiday exclusion. Normalized to LEHD daytime population estimates.
